raw_title: SEC Announces Agenda and Panelists for Roundtable on Options Market Structure
raw_content: The Securities and Exchange Commission today announced the agenda and panelists for its April 16, 2026, roundtable on options market structure.The roundtable will be held at the SEC’s headquarters at 100 F Street, N.E., Washington, D.C., from 9:00 a.m.…
